summary: Completed E2E testing of University Improvements features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend Admin: Edit question modal, image upload, AI generation dialog all working. Frontend Tu Universidad is auth-protected so cannot be tested without user session.

issues: LaTeX formulas in question list showing as raw text (e.g., '$f(x) = x^3 + 2x$') - KaTeX not applied to admin list view, only in edit modal preview
Cannot verify light mode and KaTeX rendering in student view - page requires authentication

Bulk save endpoint works for saving approved AI-generated questions
